name: Cheery Cheese Cofee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat cream cheese, powdered sugar, egg yolk, and vanilla extract together until smooth.
3. Remove rolls from cans. Save 4 pieces of dough and arrange the other 12 pieces on a greased baking sheet with large points in the center.
4. Push the dough together to cover the pan, leaving the center open. Fold up the center tips of dough to leave a hole in the middle.
5. Spread cream cheese mixture over the dough. Top with cherry pie filling.
6. Press perforations on saved dough and cut lengthwise into 8 strips.
7. Twist each strip and lay them over the filling like spokes on a wheel. Fold each dough strip over the spokes around the outer edge and also fold tips of dough in the center.
8. Brush dough with beaten egg white.
9. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until golden brown. Drizzle with powdered sugar glaze, if desired. Serve warm.
